Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Gold dragons]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 9''' — Gold dragons eat meat of the quality found in Silverfang Carp from the moment they hatch.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 4''' — The gold dragons are a notoriously vicious and cruel royal family of dragons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 8''' — The gold dragon has a serpentine body, four clawed limbs, gleaming fangs, and shining eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 8''' — The gold dragon can spew bright orange liquid flame.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 9''' — Gold dragons damaged the cloudship to weaken the Akura clan in the tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 10''' — The gold dragons have not claimed responsibility for the Blackflame team's delay.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 13''' — The gold dragons were responsible for bribing the enemies.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 14''' — Gold dragons look more human than other dragons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 14''' — Gold dragons have scales that imitate hair.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 18''' — Sopharanatoth belongs to the line of gold dragons.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 2''' — Northstrider is an enemy of the gold dragons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 6''' — Sophara is of the gold dragons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 16''' — Fury has been campaigning against the gold dragons for hundreds of years.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 23''' — The black dragon was a critic of the gold dragons' rule.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 14''' — Gold dragons are creatures that can be targeted by Akura Malice's arrows.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 2''' — The gold dragons once ruled half of the continent.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 10''' — Gold dragons are described as tyrants who do not respect what they can do.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 10''' — Gold dragons are considered tyrants because they ruled unopposed for too long.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 3''' — The gold dragons pumped Sopharanatoth to the point of critical instability in her spirit.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
